title: SOST AI Council / Central Planner
summary: Central planner that coordinates geaspirit, materials_engine and useful_compute; uses the real free-tier council as a critic when available, otherwise a deterministic heuristic.
goals: read the canonical outputs of each vertical (dossier + scorecard + filter)
decide the next task in deterministic priority order
use the real free-tier AICouncil from materials-engine-private as a critic / scorer when available
fall back to a deterministic heuristic when the council is unavailable
record every decision, error, retry and result in TRINITY_AUTONOMY_LEDGER.jsonl
never act as a blind authority: every council verdict is logged with its inputs and reasoning
hard_rules: NEVER override the hard_rules of any vertical
NEVER ignore an overclaim_risk flagged by trinity_error_memory
NEVER call paid providers; only free-tier members are wired
NEVER hide errors — every failure is appended to the ledger with a cause code
ALWAYS gate every uc_request through useful_compute hard_rules before emitting it
